verification_gate: RFC scope, immutable base, mutable overlay, promotion gate, and explicit preconditions are documented and proof-backed without implementation.
proof_summary: RFC-002 is preserved as RFC-only and cannot execute before the governed spine is stable: it declares RFC/not-part-of-v0 status, holds the v0 JSON Schema contracts immutable (Out of Scope: replacing them), specifies the mutable brainpack overlay it 'would bundle', and gates adoption behind an explicit trigger/precondition (only after v0 is stable and proof-led execution is routine).

live_commands.purpose: Validate examples against schemas, checksum spine docs 00..09, and evaluate this task's gate
